"'''The Vaynai Archipelago'''" is a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' source article published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]. It was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and illustrated by [[Ramón Pérez]].

==Continuity==
The article does not mention any subjects that did not exist [[in-universe]] outside of the three eras of play available in the first edition of the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''<ref name="TheVaynaiArchipelago">{{GamerCite|8|The Vaynai Archipelago}}</ref> as defined by that edition's [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook|core rulebook]]—the [[Time/Legends|time]] surrounding the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], the [[Rebellion era]], and the [[New Jedi Order era]]<ref name="SWRPGCR">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref>—therefore allowing game-master players to use the settings and adventure hooks described in the article in any of the mentioned time periods.<ref name="TheVaynaiArchipelago" />

The same lack of any chronological restrictions upon gameplay is also explicitly noted in the article's companion adventure, "[[Topside Infiltration]]," which was also published in ''Star Wars Gamer'' 8.<ref name="Topside Infiltration">{{GamerCite|8|Topside Infiltration}}</ref> The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' did, however, establish that the tourism industry of the islands on [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]],<ref name="CSWE Vaynai">{{CSWECite|III|298|Vaynai}}</ref> as described in the article,<ref name="TheVaynaiArchipelago" /> already catered to rich and famous individuals during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="CSWE Vaynai" /> and that both [[Preena Jallop]]<ref name="CSWE Preena Jallop">{{CSWECite|II|136|Jallop, Preena}}</ref> and [[Whuvumm]] owned and operated their [[Preena's repair bay|respective]] [[Jungle Vault|businesses]] around the same time.<ref name="CSWE Jungle Vault">{{CSWECite|II|181|Jungle Vault}}</ref>
